details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) New json_path constraint module created with comprehensive tokenizer and schema builder in srt/constrained/; (2) Validates output as valid JSON containing specified path by converting JSONPath to JSON Schema; (3) Properly registered in grammar_manager, base_grammar_backend, and protocol layers alongside regex/json_schema/ebnf constraints; (4) json_path identifier added to SglSamplingParams IR class and throughout language API layer; (5) Implementation follows existing constraint patterns with eager validation, error handling, and integration across all necessary layers. Minor deduction only for the documented approximation of recursive-descent (..) syntax as direct child property rather than full support, though this is intentional design with appropriate logging.
